version_description: This version uses a capo on the 1st fret.

versions.version_description: Let me know if you have any questions or suggestions. Ratings are very much appreciated.
Feels like these are the correct chords. Also includes video tutorial.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Capo 1


[Intro]
[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] | [ch]Am[/ch]  | x 2


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
   Ayy, Panini, don't you be a meanie[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Thought you wanted me to go up[/tab]

Why you tryna keep me teeny? I
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
   It's a dreamy, wished it on a genie[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]
I got fans finally, ain't you wanting them to see me? I[/tab]


[Refrain]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
   I thought you want this for my life, for my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
   Said you wanted to see me thrive, you lied[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Just say to me what you want from me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Just say to me what you want from me[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
   Ayy, Panini, don't you be a meanie[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Thought you wanted me to go up[/tab]

Why you tryna keep me teeny now?
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
   Now they need me, number one on streaming[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh yeah, you used to love me[/tab]

So what happened, what's the meaning? I


[Refrain]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
   I thought you want this for my life, for my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
   Said you wanted to see me thrive, you lied[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
Now when it's all done, I get the upper hand[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]
I need a big Benz, not another fan[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
But I still want you as a fan[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
I'ma need to sit down, don't mean to make demands[/tab]

But I need you to...


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Just say to me what you want from me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Just say to me what you want from me[/tab]


[Outro]
[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] | [ch]Am[/ch]  | x 2
